case_title: FRANKLIN TRINDADE VS. CHINGUN NYAMSUREN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-14-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
